text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp and the
start of a more rigorous performance-improving
training routine.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So this is the camp dorm... I just have one
question.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Is there an all-you-can-eat buffet here?
choice_data_list: ...You remember this is a training camp, right?
...You remember this is a training camp, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I haven't forgotten. And I know how important it
is.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I want to win all of my races, I'm gonna have to
train hard.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'm gonna go all-out. It's just that...
food's important too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so marks the beginning of an action-packed
summer camp with Oguri Cap.
